About The Parlour
A King West restaurant that turns into a night-service scene after dark — bottle service, flowers on every table, a menu that stays open late. Bright and plant-filled by day, moody and pink-lit once the kitchen winds down and the tables get pushed back.
About your host
@inaki has been running 70s Thursdays at The Parlour, known for keeping the table full and the room moving. Questions before tonight — reach out directly.
Tonight
Dinner seating from 6PM · Late night from 10PM · 19+

Come in dressed the part and the first round of vinyl shots is on the house
